description_long: This radiator features a series of closely spaced, horizontal slats forming a rectangular, vertically oriented body. The front face is dominated by these parallel fins, which are likely designed to maximize heat dissipation, and a small circular badge or control is visible at the top center. The sides reveal the depth of the slats, which protrude outward in a uniform, stacked arrangement, giving the radiator a ribbed appearance. The top edge is flat and slightly overhangs the slatted body, while the back appears similar to the front but without the badge. The overall finish is matte black, suggesting a modern, utilitarian design suitable for urban environments. No visible pipe connections or valves are apparent, and the object appears robust and solid.
description: A matte black radiator with horizontal slats and a small circular badge at the top, featuring a ribbed, rectangular design for efficient heat dissipation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal slats and a circular badge at the top center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and stacked arrangement of the slats, with a narrow profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without the badge, showing the full slatted surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and uniformity of the slats.
